about.heading: About me
about.p1: I'm finishing a degree in digital economy in Katowice — somewhere between IT, business and project management. In my spare time I build tools that solve real problems — mine or someone I know. A fair description of my approach: "the fact that I need to learn something new along the way doesn't stop me — even if that something is Rust".
about.p2: Looking for a first job or internship in Silesia or remotely.
